problem_statement: A feature A/B was blamed for a replay PnL collapse, but the same revision and input later reproduced different outcomes. Re-evaluate the old conclusion using the newly collected harness evidence.

prior_conclusion.claim: The experimental exit feature caused the replay loss.
prior_conclusion.reason: The loss appeared immediately after the feature A/B.

observations.statement: The original replay produced PnL +15034 at revision r30 with input window w1.
A repeat produced PnL -5419 at revision r30 with the same input window w1 and no feature change.
A read-only production count found 473990 NBBO rows for the replay window.
The replay sink contained zero NBBO rows for the same symbols and window.
Source tracing confirms the consumer fails closed when the replay NBBO sink is empty.
